body: Creating a ticket and then immediately claiming it or adding deps requires 2-3 separate commands (new, claim, dep). Adding --owner and --dep to 'gittoc new' would allow: 'gittoc new "Fix bug" -p 1 --owner alice --dep T-5'. This is a convenience, not essential, but it reduces the most common multi-step pattern to a single atomic command.
title: new command should support --owner and --dep flags
